title: Create: Craftable Emeralds
description: Basically, I wanted a way to automate emeralds. are there ways? yes. craftable? not that I know of..
body:
Ever wanted a way to craft emeralds using create? well I certainly did. So I added two simple items and a somewhat balanced recipe!

Items:
- **Amavadin** (from red mushrooms)
- **Vanadium** (from Amavadin)

Using **Vanadium**, an **Iron Nugget** and a piece of **Granite**, you can make emeralds!****
